form.formComment: Resuming after 12 weeks in the paddock. Finished off last campaign ninth of 11 at Kempton Park All Weather January 21 over 1200m, 7 len behind City Cyclone with 61kg at $6. Previously first up; sixth of 8 at Wolverhampton February 18 2025 over 1700m, 7 len behind Mariner with 61kg at $2.80. Faces a tough essay.

form.formComment: Last start 3rd of 7 at Kempton Park All Weather on March 18 over 1200m, 1.5 len behind Em Four carrying 61kg at $9.50. The run before that 8th of 12 at Kempton Park All Weather on February 18 over 1200m, 5.5 len behind Supreme King with 60kg at $8.50. Nice effort last time. Ready to win after a solid performance last time out.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after five months 9th of 11 at Newcastle All Weather on March 27 over 1400m, 2.75 len behind Havana Prince carrying 56.5kg at $34. Previously second-up 5th of 7 at Pontefract on April 30 over 1200m, 8 len behind Mister Sox with 61kg at $4.30. Is a definite threat in this line-up.

form.formComment: Second-up today. Last outing 14th of 16 at Doncaster on March 29 over 1400m, 10 len behind Jimmy Speaking carrying 58kg at $26. At only start last preparation won by 1.75 len at Nottingham October 23 over 1220m on a heavy track defeating Wichahpi carrying 61kg at $29. Expecting her to kick on with that first run out of the way.

form.formComment: Mare returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last campaign when last of 11 at Goodwood September 24 over 1200m, 35 len behind Noble Consort carrying 61kg at $12. Previous preparation first-up won by 0.8 len Southwell All Weather April 4 2025 over 1220m defeating Asadjumeirah carrying 61kg at $21. Looks tested.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Inside the final furlong, taken off its intended line.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break of six months. Finished off last preparation seventh of 9 at Bath October 20 over 1100m, soft track; 11 len behind Marching Mac with 57.5kg at $51.
